message:
chore: sync beads, regenerate CBOR vectors, fix test formatting

- .beads/issues.jsonl: sync issue tracker state
- CBOR test vectors: regenerate after key material update
- connector.rs: reformat long assert_eq line for readability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
